name: Lead Routing Rules
purpose: Route synthetic or submitted scorecard leads into internal readiness lanes based on score tier, use case, risk signals, and persona.

boundary.public_safe_summary: Internal routing helpers for funding readiness operations. Use only behind API/server logic.

safety_rules: Do not import this file from browser-facing pages or public widgets.
All names, queues, tags, and workflow references are demo-safe placeholders.
No provider names, provider IDs, affiliate URLs, apply URLs, payout terms, private contacts, borrower PII, credentials, or underwriting notes are included.
Outputs must be treated as readiness routing guidance, not a funding decision, funding offer, or outcome promise.

rules.description: Send strong files to a fast human strategy review queue without implying a funding decision.
rules.safe_internal_note_template: High-readiness lead. Review answers and documents before recommending any potential funding path.
recommended_next_actions: Confirm revenue and bank activity with applicant-provided documents.
Check whether requested amount aligns with stated revenue and funding purpose.
Prepare a readiness summary for the human strategist.

rules.description: Route mid-to-strong files with one or two caution signals into manual review.
rules.safe_internal_note_template: Review-ready lead. Clarify potential blockers before discussing next steps.
recommended_next_actions: Request missing context for any caution flag.
Collect recent bank statements and business setup details.
Use public-safe language: may be a fit, subject to review.

rules.description: Route selective-fit leads where only certain funding families may make sense.
rules.safe_internal_note_template: Selective-fit lead. Focus on readiness gaps and path education before any referral.
recommended_next_actions: Identify the primary mismatch: revenue, time in business, bank activity, credit, or documentation.
Recommend the safest next readiness step.
Avoid provider-specific guidance until human review is complete.

rules.description: Route lower-readiness leads into education and document/business foundation prep.
rules.safe_internal_note_template: Prep-first lead. Send readiness education and invite a future review once gaps are improved.
recommended_next_actions: Send business banking and revenue organization guidance.

rules.description: Escalate severe caution patterns to human review or safe decline-to-advise path without giving legal, tax, credit repair, or lending advice.
rules.safe_internal_note_template: Risk review required. Do not route to public funding path recommendations until reviewed.
recommended_next_actions: Ask for clarification only where appropriate and non-sensitive.
Escalate to a human reviewer before any funding path discussion.
